candidates.why: Direct top-line sales/revenue label; matches Total Revenue exactly in values and is the primary revenue line.
Also a valid top-line revenue label, likely alternate presentation of the same series.

candidates.row_label: Gain on Sales of Fixed Assets
candidates.why: Non-operating disposal gain, not revenue.
Explicitly marked non-revenue, so not top-line sales.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; both appear to represent the same top-line amount.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs; appears above operating profit and functions as cost of sales.

variables.notes: Selected the only clear direct-cost line.

candidates.why: Personnel/overhead component, appropriate SG&A component.
Broad operating overhead bucket, appropriate SG&A component excluding COGS and D&A.
Could be a personnel overhead component, but preview shows no values and is less comprehensive than employee benefits.
Generic overhead bucket, but empty and less preferable than explicit component rows.
Dedicated R&D line appears supplemental/below EBIT, so should not be included in XSGA under the placement rule.

variables.notes: No explicit populated SG&A total row is present. Selected the best operating overhead components and excluded COGS, depreciation/amortization, impairments, totals, and balancing rows. Did not include the supplemental R&D line because it appears below operating profit.

candidates.why: Only dedicated R&D label present; supplemental and below EBIT, so usable for XRD but not for XSGA.

variables.notes: Only identifiable R&D row is supplemental and appears below operating profit, so it is mapped to XRD only and not included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Most semantically direct interest-expense label, even though preview values are empty.
Broader finance-cost bucket; useful fallback if direct interest expense is unavailable in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Specific interest-expense line with populated values; strong match and preferable to broad financial expenses.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Too narrow; only lease-interest component, not total interest expense.
Too narrow; lease-interest component only.
Residual finance expense, not specifically interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure only, too narrow for total XINT.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list favors the most specific total interest-expense line first, then the generic interest label, then broad financial expenses as fallback.

candidates.why: A financing liability/equity-like instrument, not book equity attributable to owners.
Equity component only, not total book equity.
Adjustment line, not total equity.
Total equity line, but includes non-controlling interests; fallback only if owner equity line cannot be reliably used.

candidates.row_label: ASSETS SHAREHOLDERS EQUITY AND LIABILITIES SHAREHOLDERS EQUITY Parent company shareholders
candidates.why: Clearly malformed/concatenated header-like line and values match total assets, not equity.
Balancing line, never appropriate.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line, never appropriate.
Total balance sheet line, not equity.

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the correct owner-equity label. The full preview contains 'Parent company shareholders', which is the preferred BE concept because it excludes non-controlling interests. However, this label appears more than once on the sheet, including one malformed/header-like occurrence, so manual review is needed to confirm the intended row mapping. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Parent company shareholders

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance-sheet minority interest for PROF denominator.
Income statement attribution line, not balance-sheet minority interest.
Direct balance-sheet NCI line; appropriate MIB mapping.
Direct balance-sheet minority-interest line; appropriate MIB mapping and populated.
